elements.purpose: Smallest visual atoms — no children, no fetching, no arrangement

wrappers.purpose: Holds, groups, or spatially arranges other components

displays.purpose: Renders authored content into a specific visual format

scaffolding.purpose: One-per-page structural skeleton — heroes, portals, frame-mode

integrators.purpose: Fetches, embeds, or binds to external/third-party data
